name: Misae Nohara
description:
He is one of the main characters of the series. She is the mother of the protagonist, Shin-chan, and is the wife of Hiroshi Nohara. She is portrayed as a loving and caring mother, but can also be a little nervous and worried about her son's antics and adventures.
((The image is from the great artist D-art, do not forget to support him as he is the creator of the image))
